title: Lead
description: A normalized job or freelance posting committed to the CRM after quality gate pass.

job_id.description: MD5 hash of the canonical URL. Dedup key.

title.description: Job or gig title as scraped.

score.description: Composite fit score from scoring engine.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of the score or gate decision.

match_points.description: Concrete evidence strings from the candidate graph supporting this match.

gaps.description: Requirements the candidate does not currently evidence.

description.description: Full or summarized job posting text.

asset_path.description: Local filesystem path to tailored resume PDF.

cover_letter_path.description: Local filesystem path to cover letter PDF.

selected_projects.description: Comma-separated project titles chosen for this application.

kind.description: Distinguishes full-time/contract positions from freelance gigs.

budget.description: Budget range for freelance leads (e.g. '$500-1000' or '$50-80/hr'). Null for job leads.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when lead was first committed.
